pr_text:
## Title: Add UE state validation before protocol message processing in LTE UE sync thread

### Summary
The LTE UE synchronization thread previously proceeded to process protocol messages without validating the UE's L2 connection state. When operating in `no_L2_connect` mode, this unnecessary downstream processing could consume resources and potentially trigger undefined behavior. This patch adds an explicit state validation check immediately after thread initialization to short-circuit the thre
